steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: Since $L$ corresponds to $P$ and $M$ corresponds to $Q$, side $LM$ corresponds to side $PQ$.

steps.title: Apply the scale factor
steps.content:
Each side of triangle $PQR$ is $2$ times the corresponding side in triangle $LMN$. Therefore,
$$PQ=2\cdot LM=2\cdot 18=36$$

steps.title: Select the matching length
steps.content: The measure of side $PQ$ is $36$. The answer is D.
